description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes the built‑in Dependency‑Scanning, SAST, and Secret‑Detection templates, and also imports a custom Go CI template from the gitlab‑org/security‑products/ci‑templates project (file /includes-dev/go.yml at ref master). This configuration will automatically add the scanning jobs and the Go build/test jobs defined in those templates to the pipeline. No additional jobs, stages, images, or variables are defined directly in this file; the pipeline relies entirely on the included templates.
